summary: UX Failure Recovery Sweep - All tests passed. Fixed login redirect with ?return= URL param by adding AuthenticatedRedirect component in App.js and using useSearchParams in Login.js. Verified all error state UI elements with retry buttons exist in code.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Login.js - Added useSearchParams hook, changed from window.location.search to searchParams.get('return')
/app/frontend/src/App.js - Added AuthenticatedRedirect component to handle redirect with ?return= param preservation
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX Failure Recovery features verified: (1) Login redirect with ?return= param works correctly - user is redirected to the return path after login, (2) Gallery page loads with error state UI (gallery-load-error, gallery-retry-btn) in code, (3) UserDashboardPage has error state UI (dashboard-error-state, dashboard-retry-btn), (4) ToneSwitcher has error state UI (tone-switcher-error, tone-switcher-retry-btn), (5) CharacterLibrary has error state UI (character-library-error, character-library-retry-btn), (6) StoryVideoPipeline loads correctly, (7) Basic login flow redirects to /app, (8) 401 interceptor in api.js redirects to /login?return=<path>

login_redirect_with_return_param.description: Login with ?return=/app/story-video-studio redirects to /app/story-video-studio after successful login

basic_login_flow.description: Login without return param redirects to /app

gallery_page_loads.description: Gallery/Explore page loads with stories, filters, and content

user_dashboard_page_loads.description: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards, generation breakdown, and recent activity

tone_switcher_page_loads.description: ToneSwitcher shows text input, tone selection, and generate button

character_library_page_loads.description: CharacterLibrary shows characters and New Character button

story_video_pipeline_page_loads.description: StoryVideoPipeline shows input phase with title, story textarea, and generate button

error_state_ui_elements_verified.description: All error state UI elements with retry buttons exist in code: gallery-load-error, gallery-retry-btn, dashboard-error-state, dashboard-retry-btn, tone-switcher-error, tone-switcher-retry-btn, character-library-error, character-library-retry-btn

login_redirect_fix.issue: Login page was not reading ?return= URL param correctly due to race condition with App.js route redirect
login_redirect_fix.root_cause: When setAuth(true) was called in Login.js, App.js route for /login saw isAuthenticated=true and immediately redirected to /app via <Navigate to='/app' replace /> before Login's navigate() could execute
login_redirect_fix.fix: 1. Added AuthenticatedRedirect component in App.js that reads ?return= param and redirects to that path. 2. Changed Login.js to use useSearchParams hook instead of window.location.search for more reliable URL param reading
